# Say Tools Functionality Test
# Tests say tool functionality

# Build the say server binary
go build -o mcp-say-server .

# Test say tool (note: will actually invoke say command on macOS)
exec mcp-say-server <<EOF
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialize","params":{"protocolVersion":"2024-11-05","capabilities":{"roots":{"listChanged":true},"sampling":{}}},"id":1}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"initialized","params":{}}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"say","arguments":{"text":"Hello from MCP test"}},"id":3}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"say","arguments":{"text":"Testing voice","voice":"Samantha"}},"id":4}
{"jsonrpc":"2.0","method":"tools/call","params":{"name":"say","arguments":{"text":"Faster speech","rate":250}},"id":5}
EOF

# Verify say tool responses
stdout 'Successfully spoke'
stdout 'Hello from MCP test'
stdout 'Testing voice'
stdout 'Faster speech'
